color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
NEW EVENT ARRIVES
Inngest creates a fresh run.
No step cache exists yet.

div.style: color: rgb(45, 52, 54) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

p.strong:
Step 1 completed
in this run before?

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
EXECUTE step code fresh
Calls Gemini and Qdrant.
Gets real results.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Cache step 1 result
RAGSearchResult stored under
this run ID + step name.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SKIP step code entirely
Returns old cached result.
Your code fix has NO effect.

div.style: color: rgb(45, 52, 54) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

p.strong:
Step 2 completed
in this run before?

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
EXECUTE step code fresh
Runs generate-answer normally.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SKIP step code entirely
Returns old cached answer.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(45, 52, 54) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TRAP — Why retries fail after a bug fix:
Fix code → retry same run →
Inngest still replays cached empty result.
SOLUTION: Send a BRAND NEW event.
